findings.title: Reset route is registered before its rate limiter

reasoning: All four repository files were inspected. The reset handler is registered at src/server.js:10, while the password limiter is mounted later at line 16. The handler sends a response without calling next, so reset requests reach it before the limiter. Password hashing uses bcrypt with cost 12 and bcrypt comparison; reset tokens use crypto.randomBytes(32), a SHA-256 stored digest, timingSafeEqual, expiry, and a used flag. The reset response is generic, and no development-environment bypass or login/MFA route is present.
